---
name: Feature Request
about: A new capability, repo-hardening improvement, or scientific-surface request
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<p>
  <img src="../assets/readme/zpe-masthead.gif" alt="ZPE Video Masthead" width="100%">
</p>

<p>
  <img src="../assets/readme/section-bars/feature-request.svg" alt="FEATURE REQUEST" width="100%">
</p>

**What are you proposing?**

A clear description of the capability, documentation improvement, or
scientific-surface extension you are proposing.

**Which category best describes this?**

- [ ] Repo organization or docs improvement
- [ ] Proof routing or reproducibility improvement
- [ ] Code or tooling improvement
- [ ] New evaluation or experiment surface
- [ ] Other (describe)

**Why does this belong here?**

Explain how this fits the live Video repo rather than the outer
workspace.

**Evidence or gating strategy**

What artifact, falsification protocol, or comparator would you use to
judge this request?

**Scope discipline**

- [ ] This proposal does not inflate the current science state
- [ ] This proposal identifies what would count as failure, not only what would count as success
